description: Family medicine board exam knowledge base: queryable question bank (1,629 questions, 2018-2025) linked to a clinical guideline library (1,936 articles, 404 PDFs) via a structured SQLite pipeline. Extends beyond exam prep into clinical decision support.
git_status: Initialized (main branch). Latest clean commit: 94fdc6a. Next commit staged but blocked by .git/index.lock (Windows delete needed).

module_structure.00_database: Source of truth (DB + supporting data, schemas, logs)
module_structure.01_module.1_warehouse: PDF library (4 tiers, 404 PDFs) + M1 scripts (build/6, maintain/13)
module_structure.02_module.2_processor: Extraction + enrichment pipeline (45 scripts + 1 config JSON, all paths dynamic)

supporting_folders.archive_canonical: Curated deliverables (curriculum, question bank, analysis, reference data, acquisition lists)
supporting_folders.extracted_json: 242 extracted article JSONs — middle-man layer, NOT git-tracked
supporting_folders.key_data_files: Critical reference data (VC gate, exam CSVs, question bank)
supporting_folders.re-org_guidance: Architecture docs, auto-memory copies, rebuild protocols

codon_convention: Author_Year#@#ART-XXXX@#@.pdf — ART-ID embedded between #@# start and @#@ stop codon
vc_gate: key_data_files/session_hy_inserts_v7.json (352 citations — sole criterion for right_click vs local_lite tier)

intelligence_layers.layer_2_pubmed: NOT STARTED — article_currency table, superseded_by chains

script_placement_rules.no_hardcoded_paths: All paths dynamic — no C:\Users\... anywhere in scripts

key_conventions.source_data_protected: DB + PDFs + VC gate survive everything. Derivatives are disposable.
key_conventions.schema_first: Define schema before writing build script
key_conventions.fix_data_not_code: Upstream data cleanup preferred over defensive code
key_conventions.baton_supersedes_all: Active BATON is the source of truth for current state

pending_windows_actions: Delete .git/index.lock (0-byte file at project root .git folder) to unblock staged commit
